---
name: api-design
description: "Use when: designing, reviewing, or troubleshooting REST APIs, HTTP endpoints, or web service integrations. Covers OpenAPI, endpoint structure, parameter conventions, error handling, and best practices for API usability and reliability."
---

# API Design Skill

**Use for:**
- Designing or reviewing RESTful APIs
- Troubleshooting HTTP requests, responses, and error codes
- Explaining OpenAPI/Swagger specs
- Best practices for endpoint naming, versioning, and parameter usage
- Diagnosing CORS, authentication, or HTTP status issues

**Not for:**
- General web development (use webdev skill)
- UI/UX design
